title: Evangelion 20 Soundtrack
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0 Soundtrack (SPOILERS) Post by skikes » Thu Jul 23, 2009 2:48 pm This is just a topic for people who have seen the camrip or those few very lucky ones who have seen it on the big screen. I'd just like to know what everyone's opinion on the BGM of evangelion 2.0? I watched the camrip last night and it blew me away. I loved it! I love the story. I love that its doing something completely different from the original series. My only real complaint is the background music. The scene when unit 01 is destroying bardiel, i just didnt think the childish song fitted well at all. I mean i understand that during a particularly brutal scene playing a whimsical song can give the scene a real chilling feel to it but personally i felt that in this instance it seemed forced and didnt fit well at all. I have the same complaint for the song they choose for the climax. It just didn't fit well for me either. Also during unit 02 first battle i just didnt think the bgm had much punch to it. I hope that for the possible evangelion 2.22 release this might be addressed if not i cant imagined funi leaving it intact for their dub.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Thu Jul 23, 2009 2:53 pm Opinions on Rebuild OST to be found here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6931 @Roblucci: I guess I'm just quick off the draw... *blows smoke off imaginary gun*

[]: Post by roblucci01 » Thu Jul 23, 2009 2:54 pm Already a thread on this: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6931&postdays=0&postorder=asc&start=0[/url] EDIT amn, Lloyd beat me to it >_>

[]: Post by skikes » Thu Jul 23, 2009 2:57 pm thanks. lock it.

The scene when unit 01 is destroying bardiel, i just didnt think the childish song fitted well at all.
